description: Product Description Touchscreen Friendly When you have gloves on, you can use the touchscreen-compatible forefinger tips to make calls or play games while keeping your hands warm thanks to silicone printing on the palm and fingertips. This keeps you out of the cold during the winter when your children are playing outside on their bikes or scooters. Traction-Reducing Running Gloves Windproof anti-slip running gloves for youngsters aged 4 to 12 who want to keep their hands warm during the chilly winter. While cycling on a mountain bike or other cycle sport in the cold weather, thermal gloves with a good fit should be used. Breathable Material Junior travel gloves are constructed of a blend of flexible materials that are incredibly soft, warm, and windproof and keep little hands warm and dry. Children's touch screen gloves with a responsive touchscreen for the thumb and index finger.
